title: bot: deserialization failures silently ignored
description: In dispatcher.rs dispatch_payload (lines 41-46), ClearMessage deserialization failures return None with only debug log. Corrupted data, malformed JSON, and MLS ciphertext all produce None identically. Per error discipline, missing error paths silently swallow failures. Correct: distinguish between expected (MLS) and unexpected (malformed) failures—emit BotEvent::Error for unparseable JSON.
